name: tesshari-foundry
description: Build tooling for the Tesshari Foundry VTT system (compendium pipeline).

scripts.pack:cards: fvtt package pack cards --id tesshari --type System --in packs-src/cards --out packs
scripts.pack:items: fvtt package pack items --id tesshari --type System --in packs-src/items --out packs
scripts.pack:all: npm run pack:cards && npm run pack:items
scripts.all: npm run build-packs && npm run pack:all
